mapper.sql: SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_code, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_type, e.location, e.qr_content, e.bluetooth_name, e.tenant_id, e.status, e.del_flag, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.remark, d.device_id, d.device_code, d.device_name FROM xd_equipment e LEFT JOIN xd_equipment_device ed ON ed.equipment_id = e.equipment_id AND ed.status = 'active' AND ed.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN iot_device d ON d.device_id = ed.device_id AND d.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: WHERE e.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND e.del_flag = '0'
WHERE e.equipment_code = #{equipmentCode} AND e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND e.del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: UPDATE xd_equipment SET del_flag = '2' WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
